Variables.Name: BiomesOwner
Variables.Description: Owner Biomes of this LayerInfoObject. Do not modify this Owner unless necessary.

Variables.Name: LayerIndex
Variables.Description: Layer index of this layer info object, can be re-ordered.

Variables.Name: TextureRotation
Variables.Description: Rotation (in degree) applied when sampling diffusenormal texture

Variables.Name: TextureTiling
Variables.Description: Scaling applied when sampling diffusenormal texture

Variables.Name: HeightBlendThresholdSoftness
Variables.Description: ThresholdSoftness adjusts how sharp the edges of the height blend will be. The greater the value is, the softer the edge would be.

Variables.Name: HeightContrast
Variables.Description: HeightContrast adjust sampled height value's contrast.

Variables.Name: DisplacementLocalBias
Variables.Description: Convert displacement from texture space to world space, unit is meter.

Variables.Name: DisplacementIntensity
Variables.Description: Scalar applied to displacement, applied after LocalBias is applied.
